nodes.label: AI as foundation for customization
nodes.label_negative: AI as complete solution without adjustment
nodes.grounding_span: I will typically start with using AI as a template or providing a foundation and then will adjust or complete to fit the needs of our business

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner in early/middle stages
nodes.grounding_span: Typically I will collaborate with AI at the beginning / middle of the task then complete the task independently

nodes.label: AI as skill amplifier
nodes.grounding_span: I see AI as an enabler of being able to be better at the existing skill sets to come up with a better output

nodes.label: AI output validation necessity
nodes.grounding_span: I always need to validate the output and double check if I am using this type of feature

nodes.label: AI efficiency in data generation
nodes.grounding_span: creating specific data samples or data sets for testing ... AI has made it almost effortless

nodes.label: Business-specific accuracy and relevance
nodes.grounding_span: there is terminology, acronyms etc that is bespoke to our business and requires adjustment

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: AI has made it almost effortless

nodes.label: Skill development and value creation
nodes.grounding_span: put the time in to learn how to use these AI tools to provide even more value

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for data generation
nodes.grounding_span: AI has made it almost effortless

nodes.label: Frustration with AI losing context in rewrites
nodes.grounding_span: has completely removed the context as part of the solution

nodes.label: Optimistic view of AI as skill enabler
nodes.grounding_span: I see AI as an enabler of being able to be better at the existing skill sets

nodes.label: Cautious approach to AI delegation
nodes.grounding_span: I have not yet found many use cases where I would delegate AI to completely handle a task independently

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with human final control
nodes.grounding_span: collaborate with AI at the beginning / middle of the task then complete the task independently

nodes.label: Contextual layering of business knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: providing AI with the technical context and then applying the specific business and industry context after the fact
